notes: v0.3.12: 1080p quality + H.264 + format picker. Resolution now 1080p per cell (was 540p), bitrate 4 Mbps (was 1.5), H.264/MP4 preferred for sharper video + instant Windows playback (VP8/WebM fallback if needed). New format picker: Square (1:1), Portrait (4:5), Full Vertical (9:16) — choose before recording. Cover-crop fills each cell edge-to-edge. 60s duration cap + 30fps retained. 60fps coming in v0.3.13 once we raise the live camera feed.
